docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED SEP-02-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRIO NAILS
(SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER** (REQUEST & ANSWER FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRIO NAILS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BECK, CYNTHIA AS TO DEFENDANT TRIO NAILS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) THU HANG VO, OWNER. FILED BY DEFENDANT TRIO NAILS
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY BECK, CYNTHIA TRIO NAILS
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108)- REQUEST TO CANCEL JUDGMENT - EVIDENCE NOT ACCESSIBLE DURING HEARING WAS FURNISHED IMMEDIATELY AFTER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BECK, CYNTHIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BECK, CYNTHIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRIO NAILS EXPANDED TEXT - SEE ATTACHMENT (MC-025) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2022 - CONTINUED THE COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO DEC-07-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CYNTHIA BECK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TRIO NAILS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY THU HANG VO, OWNER. COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER HONG HA IS PRESENT BUT NOT NEEDED FOR TODAY. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO FEB-27-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CYNTHIA BECK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TRIO NAILS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY THU HANG VO, OWNER. COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER HONG HAT PROVIDES ENGLISH/VIETNAMESE INTERPERTATION. PLAINTIFFS NEEDS TO PROVIDE ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT HER CLAIM THAT DEFENDANT CAUSED DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFFS NAILS, SUCH AS A DOCTORS NOTE AND OTHER EVIDENCE TO PROVE THAT SHE WAS A CUSTOMER AT DEFENDANT TRIO NAILS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2023 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF CYNTHIA BECK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TRIO NAILS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY THU HANG VO, OWNER, REPRESENTED BY HONG HA (#300215). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2023 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS DENIED. RE: REQUEST TO CANCEL JUDGMENT - EVIDENCE NOT ACCESSIBLE DURING HEARING WAS FURNISHED IMMEDIATELY AFTER.
